name: claude-workshop-skills
description: Two Claude Code plugins for the Hebrew University research workshop: slide-deck (build a presentation from an idea) and code-review (a strict review of your changes).

plugins.name: slide-deck
plugins.description: Build LaTeX/beamer presentations via pandoc with a configurable brand palette. Three commands: /slide-deck:new bootstraps a deck, /slide-deck:review renders slides to PNG and runs a 13-rule inspection, and /slide-deck:critique scores the deck against a 6-dimension rubric.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Strict code review orchestrator - dispatches code-style, test-validation, test-minimizer, and refactoring-safety reviewers in parallel, plus per-language packs. Run /strict-review to analyze your branch diff.
